layoutNotes.description: Top-to-bottom rows. Each character represents one grid cell.

levels.designNotes: First level. Very readable blocks. Player should learn direct shots and basic collection.
Adds a clearer falling reward. Blue blocks can be dropped in a satisfying early pattern.
The first true difficulty jump. Bounce lane remains visible, but the center cluster is denser and the collect requirement is mandatory.
A wider bridge with fewer free gaps. Players must target support cuts more deliberately.
Collection becomes a real requirement while the board leaves less room for inefficient shots.
Blue collection is now attached to a tighter structure, requiring cleaner setup before the drop.
The board rewards a big collapse, but missing the support line now costs much more.
Four-color reading appears in a denser arrangement with fewer free rescue angles.
Mixed-color pockets remain available, but the center lane is less forgiving than before.
Stone obstacle is introduced as a true route blocker. The player must either route around it or plan for later removal.
Red collection now happens around two blocking stones, pushing players to read structure instead of color alone.
Rainbow skill ball appears near a constrained bridge so players can feel its value as a color fixer.
Split islands create competing priorities, while the rainbow lane offers one controlled recovery path.
Blast skill ball enters alongside stone blockers to teach local structure breaking.
The board is more symmetrical, but a blast pickup and stone blocker force stronger path commitment.
Ice obstacle is introduced as a two-step problem: thaw first, then clear the inner color.
A long bridge now mixes blast value with an ice delay, turning the collapse into a multi-step setup.
Dense reading now includes both hard and soft blockers, reducing clean direct clears.
Late-game collection pressure now sits behind stone and ice blockers, with a blast pickup as the main escape hatch.
Final prototype board mixes every core pressure: dense colors, route blockers, skill pickups and a two-step ice target.
